name: d-asp
description: The Sovereign Post-Quantum Enclave for Identity & Asset Recovery.
author: Victor Kane

scripts.build:wasm: cd rust && cargo build --release --target wasm32-unknown-unknown && copy target\wasm32-unknown-unknown\release\dasp_crypto.wasm ..\node\dasp_crypto.wasm
scripts.build:go: cd go && go build -o main.exe main.go
scripts.build:c: cd c && "C:\Program Files\LLVM\bin\clang.exe" -O3 -o dasp.exe main.c spna_engine.c gf_math.c ml_kem.c fips202.c sha512.c sha256.c aes.c rng.c poly.c poly_sampling.c -I. -lws2_32 -luserenv -ladvapi32 -lbcrypt -march=native -mtune=native -mavx2 -fno-strict-aliasing
scripts.build:engines: npm run build:rust && npm run build:wasm && npm run build:go && npm run build:node && npm run build:python && npm run build:c && npm run build:cuda && npm run build:csharp && npm run build:zig
scripts.lint:c: cd c && "C:\Program Files\LLVM\bin\clang.exe" -fsyntax-only -Wall -Wextra -D_CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS -D_CRT_NONSTDC_NO_DEPRECATE main.c spna_engine.c gf_math.c ml_kem.c fips202.c sha512.c sha256.c aes.c rng.c poly.c poly_sampling.c -I.
scripts.lint:engines: npm run lint:rust && npm run lint:go && npm run lint:c && npm run lint:python
scripts.format:python: python -m pip install black && python -m black python/dasp.py
scripts.build:node: cd node && npm install && npm run build
